text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her natural charms, Mayano Top Gun has
become quite popular since she started
streaming.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems she's stopped streaming for
some reason. We're spending the whole day
together, so...
choice_data_list: Are you not going to stream anymore?
Are you not going to stream anymore?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Um... Nah, it got boring! Going out with you is
much more fun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It was nice getting so much praise, but I think I've
had enough!
choice_data_list: But you seemed to be really enjoying yourself...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I-it's fine! Let's change the subject!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
There's a new issue of my favorite magazine, so
I'm gonna go buy a copy! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without really saying anything, Mayano Top Gun
runs off at full speed.
choice_data_list: Something's off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to go through her archived footage to
see if I can figure out what's going on.
choice_data_list:
Seems like there are a lot of negative comments
about me...

Seems like there are a lot of negative comments
about me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've appeared in a few of her streams,
there's a noticeable jealousy toward me showing
through in the comments.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if these comments are the reason why
Mayano Top Gun stopped streaming.
choice_data_list: I have to talk to her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are so many places she could have run off
to, so I check them one by one.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer?!
choice_data_list: Finally! There you are!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You've been looking for me all this time?
choice_data_list: I figured out why you stopped your live streams.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't want to talk about it. I already told you
why I quit...
choice_data_list: Thank you for worrying about me.
Thank you for worrying about me.
Let the haters keep hating.
It'd be a waste of your talent to quit now.
It'd be a waste of your talent to quit now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't want to talk about it. I already told you
why I quit...
choice_data_list: Thank you for worrying about me.
Thank you for worrying about me.
Let the haters keep hating.
It'd be a waste of your talent to quit now.
It'd be a waste of your talent to quit now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once I tell her that I saw the negative comments
and how grateful I am for her consideration...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not it! I just got bored, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I decided to stop for a while and realized that I
shine the brightest when I'm racing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep running and working hard with you
by my side.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna entrance people like never before!
choice_data_list: Mayano...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: S-stop! Quit making that sad face!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll always be happy as long as you're with me,
Trainer—no matter what I'm doing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I nod silently at her words.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she's lying, I'm sure it's for a good reason,
and I shouldn't forcefully try to expose her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead, as her trainer, it's my job to help her
achieve her dreams and make her shine.
choice_data_list: I promise I'll make you happy!
I promise I'll make you happy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer! What did you just—
choice_data_list:
I'll make you shine brighter than any other
racer!

I'll make you shine brighter than any other
racer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh... So that's what you meant.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll make a promise too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I promise that I'll become a dazzling lady who
never loses! I'll be as twinkly as the stars!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: As long as I'm with you. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that I want her to keep streaming
just like she has been up until now...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But why?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You should be upset! It should hurt! You're always
working so hard...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You help me with filming and training, and you're
always supporting me...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But those comments are my fault... They're my
fault, so why?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're being silly, Trainer! Why aren't you mad at
me?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...
choice_data_list: Sorry...
Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sob... This is what I mean...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I like how you're super nice to me, but you're not
allowed to be this nice to anybody else—only me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You can be as mad as you want at comments
saying that you're unnecessary or some kinda
bother!
choice_data_list: Let's prove them wrong at your next race.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Fine! Guess I have no choice!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'm going to take the top spot just for you,
my sweet Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That'll put the haters to shame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The night sky above is full of shining stars, as if to
represent the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shouldn't quit streaming just because of some
negative comments directed toward me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask if she has had fun with her audience up until
now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Of course I have, but they said such terrible
things about you...
choice_data_list:
I think they'll understand if you just tell them
how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. I'll give it one more shot.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Um... Long time no see, huh? This is Channel
Maya.

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer A: Maya? Is it really you?! Viewer B: I've
missed you so much! Viewer C: She seems kinda
down.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, sorry. I've got something I wanna talk to
you guys about today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying this, Mayano Top Gun casts her eyes
toward the ground, unsure of how to broach the
subject.
choice_data_list: (You can do it, Mayano!)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Streaming has been really fun, and I'm really
grateful that you guys have been watching me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But all the negative comments toward my trainer
make me upset.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We're both working really hard so I can win my
races...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm super glad to have your support, but I don't
wanna be sad, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer D: We love you! Viewer E: Sorry, Maya.
Viewer F: Guess we went too far, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone. But I still think I'm gonna
take a break from streaming for a bit.
choice_data_list: What?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
During my little hiatus, I realized something—I'm
at my twinkliest when I'm racing.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna miss you guys, but... I wanna show you
the best, most amazing version of myself!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text: Viewer G: Are you serious? Viewer H: This sucks...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Guys...

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer I: I'll support you, Maya! Viewer J: Me
too! Viewer K: I'll come watch your next race!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! You guys can always come to my races!
I'll be waiting for you on the turf!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the next scrimmage, I notice an unusually large
crowd of fans cheering Maya on.
